all_news_section.headline: Aaj ki sabse badi aur impactful market headline — engaging, concise, Hinglish mein.
all_news_section.summary: Pichle 24 ghante ka complete global market breakdown. Kya bada hua, kyun hua, aur markets par kya asar pada — sab kuch Hinglish mein detail mein likhna hai. Minimum 150 words. USD, equities, bonds, commodities, aur crypto ka overall narrative cover karo.

high_impact_events.event_name: HIGHEST IMPACT — Event name (e.g. FOMC Rate Decision, NFP, CPI)
high_impact_events.impact_explanation: Sabse zyada market-moving event pehle — is event se market par kya asar padne wala hai detail mein aur Hinglish mein samjhao. Kaunse symbols directly affect honge, kya direction expect karo, aur kya levels pe nazar rakhna hai.

high_impact_events.event_name: 2nd Event — Global Central Bank Speech or Decision
high_impact_events.impact_explanation: Second most impactful event ka detailed Hinglish explanation with market impact across symbols.

high_impact_events.event_name: 3rd Event — Major US Macro Data Release
high_impact_events.impact_explanation: Third event ka detailed Hinglish explanation — GDP, PCE, ISM, retail sales ya koi bhi major US economic release.
Geopolitical event ka impact — wars, sanctions, trade wars, diplomatic developments aur unka market par assar.
S&P 500, Nasdaq, DAX, Nikkei, ya Hang Seng ka significant move aur uska ripple effect currencies aur commodities par.
US 10Y yield, JGB, ya Bund mein significant move aur uska USD, JPY, CHF par impact.

high_impact_events.event_name: 7th Event — Commodities Move (Oil, Copper, Iron Ore)
high_impact_events.impact_explanation: WTI/Brent crude, natural gas, copper ya iron ore ka major price move aur uska CAD, AUD, NZD par direct impact.
XAUUSD ya XAGUSD ka significant catalyst — ETF flows, COMEX positioning, central bank buying, real yield changes.
BTC ya ETH ka major move, regulatory news, spot ETF inflow/outflow data ya on-chain development.
China PMI, PBoC action, India RBI, Japan trade balance ya koi Asia-specific data jo AUD, NZD, JPY ko directly affect kare.
Currency intervention warning, CFTC positioning data, carry trade unwind, ya koi FX-specific catalyst.
Koi bhi 12th significant event jo markets ko affect kare — earnings shock, sovereign rating change, unexpected data surprise ya koi breaking development.

latest_headlines: Gold se related latest headline 1 — specific price action ya catalyst mention karo
Gold se related latest headline 2 — another key development
XAUUSD.detailed_breakdown: Gold mein pichle 24 ghante mein kya bada news movement hua. Dollar index ka kya impact raha, real yields ne kya kiya, ETF flows kaisi thi, COMEX positioning kya bol rahi hai, aur session open hote hi kya expect karna hai — sab kuch detailed Hinglish mein. Minimum 100 words.
XAUUSD.trader_alert: Retail traders ke liye ek important, urgent note ya warning — Hinglish mein. Key level, risk event, ya positioning advice jo is specific symbol ke liye critical hai right now.
